items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: The puppets are ready. I'm all set for tonight's performance, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Of course. I've been spending most of my time dealing with criminals.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Many of them have lost all scraps of humanity. As long as they're alive, they'll keep doing harm. I've stopped some, but there's always more out there.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Lei used to steal, but he's not a lost cause. He lacks bravery and brags, but he knows there are other ways to survive.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Now he's turned his life around, and as someone who fights crime, it brings me joy to see that change.

options.text: This isn't the only reason, right?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: What do you mean…?

options.text: You discovered the truth long ago.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Heh… Of course you'd see through my lies, {PlayerName}. Alright, I didn't think this level of performance would fool you either.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: But I'm curious. How did you figure it out?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Indeed. Lei was my informant. I had to keep an eye on him to make sure he didn't rat me out.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: So, it didn't make sense for me to not know he had gone straight… That was a glaring flaw in my words, yes.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Your theory makes sense—Uncle Li is known for his exquisite taste, and the items he bought just happened to attract attention from greedy Tacet Discords like Spearback.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Plus, Lei's past with the Savage Beasts suggests he has strong hunting skills. It would be easy to put two and two together from here.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Heh, your instinct is sharp indeed. Noticed that since the first time we met.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Oh? What is it then?

options.text: You are a great undercover agent. Very experienced.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: …So, you believe I wouldn't mess up such a simple case?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Hehe, I see. So {PlayerName} really does trust me a lot, huh?

options.text: I had a lot of fun today.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Same here. I haven't felt this happy in a long time.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I should be the one thanking you, {PlayerName}. I haven't felt this happy in a long time.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: You make me feel like I can be myself, no masks or pretending. I can do whatever I want, without any masks. You are... the only one.

options.text: "So Yinlin really does trust me a lot, huh?"

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Sure I do. But earning my trust is no easy task.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Can you do something for me, {PlayerName}?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Don't worry. I won't ask for anything outrageous. It's simple.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: No matter how busy you are, remember to come watch my performance. I'll be waiting until you show up.
